text: Clicking Run while signed out now opens an inline choice (sign in or paste your NanoGPT key) with an explainer, instead of silently redirecting to login.
Drag a wire off an input to move it to another input — or pull it onto empty canvas to detach it. Fixes inputs (e.g. on a Join node) that stuck to both the old and new source.
Scrolling to the end of a prompt box no longer makes the canvas zoom out — and you can always zoom back in (hold Ctrl/⌘ and scroll, or move the cursor off the text box).
First time you open the app builder, a one-time dismissible hint explains that ✎ Edit workflow takes you back to the graph and keeps your app.
New visitors get a one-line "press ▶ Run, or ＋ Add node" hint (dismissible, shown once) and a 🖼️ Gallery button to browse & remix example workflows.
New ⊡ Fit button (and the F key or a double-click on empty canvas) frames your whole workflow in view, and the demo graph now auto-fits on first load so it never spills off small screens.
Undo/redo your canvas — Ctrl/Cmd+Z brings back a deleted node or wire, Shift+Z (or Ctrl+Y) redoes; hovering a wire now reddens it and shows "click to remove".

Shorter share links + share-to-social — the Share menu can now shrink a link (TinyURL/da.gd) and post straight to X, Reddit, Facebook or email, and exported apps now show a proper title card when shared on social.
Resize any node by dragging its bottom-right corner — and prompt boxes start bigger

Version history no longer loses work — in 💬 Describe changes (editor) and app Customize, applying a change off an older version now adds a new one instead of wiping the versions after it. Jumping versions with unsaved canvas edits auto-saves them as their own version first (no prompt), so you can always get them back.
Shared & exported apps now respect a fixed Seed too — re-running won't regenerate or re-charge an unchanged result, matching the editor.
Set a Seed on Image/Edit/Inpaint to lock a result — re-running won't regenerate or re-charge it. Leave Seed blank for a fresh roll each run, as before.
New 💬 Describe changes — edit your workflow by describing the change in plain words; it updates your canvas right away (powered by gptdiff) and you can undo in one click.
Video nodes no longer show generation modes they can't use — a Text→Video node won't offer "Edit Video" or "Reference to Video" anymore.
New 🏆 Submit button — grab your Cookoff entry link, see the prizes, and post to Discord or r/nanocurrency in one place (it also pops up right after you hit 🔗 Share).
Fixed the 🎙️ Transcribe node — speech-to-text was failing on every run (wrong upload field); it now returns text again.
LLM node can now take an audio input — wire a clip (or a 🗣️ Speech node) into a model that listens, to transcribe, describe, or critique what it hears.
Edit node now accepts multiple reference images — composite a product, a scene, and a face together on models that support it (Nano-Banana, Seedream…).
Image nodes can generate several variations at once — pick the best from a thumbnail strip (and models that always return 4, like Midjourney, no longer waste the extra 3).
Transcribe: models with a fixed language list now offer a dropdown instead of a free-text box, so you can't mistype a language code.
Video nodes expose more per-model knobs — negative prompt, seed, CFG and other text/number options now show up under ⚙️ Model options.
Video models that generate sound (Veo 3, Kling, Seedance…) now play their audio in the preview instead of staying silently muted.
LLM node ⚙️ advanced: set temperature & max tokens, force JSON output, and pick reasoning effort (with an optional thinking trace) — controls light up per model.
Avatar / lipsync now works with a 🗣️ Speech node's audio — fixed a "Failed to fetch" that blocked turning text-to-speech into a talking video.
Lipsync now explains how to fix a too-long chained song instead of failing with "Failed to fetch".
Lipsync — hides multi-speaker avatar models that need two voices, so the picker only offers avatars that actually run with one TTS track
Sharing an app now flags when you've tweaked a model or prompt while using it — a clear heads-up that the link copies the app itself, not your current session
Add-node menu is now searchable — type to filter (or use ↑↓/Enter), with your recent nodes and a "Start here" shortlist pinned up top
New ✂️ Trim node to cut audio to a start + length — and lipsync now takes long songs: they ride full-length and auto-trim to the avatar model's limit if needed
Apps built from an Edit node now let people type their own edit instruction — not just the one style you baked in
Closing the ✨ Create app window no longer loses your app — reopen and pick up right where you left off
Image & video nodes now show each model's real sizes, resolutions, aspect ratios and durations — and the price tracks your choice

New 🎨 LoRA on Image, Edit & Video nodes — paste any HuggingFace .safetensors URL to restyle a generation, and stack several to blend styles. Works across Flux, FLUX.2, Z-Image and LTX video; hit “try an example” for a verified one-click demo matched to your model
New 📣 Updates button — a running changelog of what's new, right in the editor
Added a 🍜 Noodle Cookoff promo + contest announcement modal
Simplified the first run — you land straight on a clean canvas
Inpaint: widened the picker to 17 verified mask-honoring edit models
New Inpaint node — brush a region of an image and repaint just that area
